What is the enrollment for charter schools in Los Angeles?

Schema:
CREATE TABLE frpm (
  CDSCode TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  `District Name` TEXT,
  `School Name` TEXT,
  `District Type` TEXT,
  `School Type` TEXT,
  `FRPM Count (K-12)` INTEGER,
  `Percent (%) Eligible Free (K-12)` REAL,
  `Percent (%) Eligible FRPM (K-12)` REAL,
  `Enrollment (K-12)` INTEGER,
  `Charter School (Y/N)` TEXT,
  `Low Grade` TEXT,
  `High Grade` TEXT
);

CREATE TABLE schools (
  CDSCode TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  `School Name` TEXT,
  `District Name` TEXT,
  County TEXT,
  City TEXT,
  `ZIP Code` TEXT,
  `Street Address` TEXT,
  `Phone Number` TEXT,
  `Grade Span Offered` TEXT
);

CREATE TABLE satscores (
  cds TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  `School Name` TEXT,
  `Number of Test Takers` INTEGER,
  `Average Score Reading` INTEGER,
  `Average Score Math` INTEGER,
  `Average Score Writing` INTEGER,
  `Number of Students Enrolled` INTEGER
);
SELECT f.`Enrollment (K-12)` FROM frpm f JOIN schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode WHERE f.`Charter School (Y/N)` = 'Y' AND s.City = 'Los Angeles'
